description.en: Send an offer to purchase a specific NFT. The NFT owner can accept your offer.
description.de: Ein Angebot zum Kauf eines bestimmten NFT senden. Der NFT-Besitzer kann dein Angebot annehmen.
description.es: Send an offer to purchase a specific NFT. The NFT owner can accept your offer.
description.fr: Send an offer to purchase a specific NFT. The NFT owner can accept your offer.
description.ro: Send an offer to purchase a specific NFT. The NFT owner can accept your offer.
description.it: Send an offer to purchase a specific NFT. The NFT owner can accept your offer.

description.en: The token identifier of the NFT you want to buy.
description.de: Die Token-Kennung des NFT, das du kaufen möchtest.
description.es: The token identifier of the NFT you want to buy.
description.fr: The token identifier of the NFT you want to buy.
description.ro: The token identifier of the NFT you want to buy.
description.it: The token identifier of the NFT you want to buy.

description.en: The nonce of the NFT you want to buy.
description.de: Die Nonce des NFT, das du kaufen möchtest.
description.es: The nonce of the NFT you want to buy.
description.fr: The nonce of the NFT you want to buy.
description.ro: The nonce of the NFT you want to buy.
description.it: The nonce of the NFT you want to buy.

description.en: The amount of NFTs to buy (for SFTs, use 1 for NFTs).
description.de: Die Anzahl der zu kaufenden NFTs (für SFTs, verwenden Sie 1 für NFTs).
description.es: The amount of NFTs to buy (for SFTs, use 1 for NFTs).
description.fr: The amount of NFTs to buy (for SFTs, use 1 for NFTs).
description.ro: The amount of NFTs to buy (for SFTs, use 1 for NFTs).
description.it: The amount of NFTs to buy (for SFTs, use 1 for NFTs).

description.en: Offer deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
description.es: Offer deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
description.fr: Offer deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
description.ro: Offer deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
description.it: Offer deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).

description.en: The address of the NFT owner.
description.es: The address of the NFT owner.
description.fr: The address of the NFT owner.
description.ro: The address of the NFT owner.
description.it: The address of the NFT owner.

description.en: Your offer payment amount in the payment token.
description.es: Your offer payment amount in the payment token.
description.fr: Your offer payment amount in the payment token.
description.ro: Your offer payment amount in the payment token.
description.it: Your offer payment amount in the payment token.
